title: [codereview-pass1] propagation.py: f-string literals in ValueError messages (EM102, TRY003)
description: The __post_init__ and path_loss methods use f-strings directly in raise ValueError(...). Linter requires assigning message to variable first for security/best practice (even though not user controlled). Also applies to existing distance error. P4 maintainability. File: python/src/lichen/sim/propagation.py:87,89,105
